ocr_findings.description: The image shows two separate tables (学生表 with 4 columns including 教員番号, and 教員表 with 2 columns) displayed side-by-side, joined by an arrow to produce a merged result table. OCR merges all three tables into a single continuous markdown table structure, losing the visual separation of 学生表 vs 教員表. The data values are preserved but the two-table-join visual structure is lost.
Section heading rendered as '0-9 結合' in OCR; image shows '●● 結合' (bullet-dot markers used as section numbering icon). The icon was misread as '0-9'.
'試験にはつしが出る！' in OCR line 29; image shows '試験にはコレが出る！'. Recurring mascot icon misread.
Section number '10' in OCR heading '# 10 データ操作と論理演算' corresponds to '⑩' (circled number) in image. Minor glyph normalization.

reviewer_notes: Page explains the 結合 (join) database operation with a two-table join diagram. The primary issue is table_format: the side-by-side 学生表+教員表 layout is flattened into a linear sequence losing the visual join semantics, though all data values are present. Two med-severity findings (table format and section icon misread) put this at WARN. Text content of the exam-tip box and bottom 論理演算 section is well preserved.
